TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pibutingan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 370 buwan, 1,056 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 225 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 831 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 48%, Sakizaya 10%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pibutingan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pibutingan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pibutingan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pibutingan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pibutingan hya' ga Sudadatan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ piβutiŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕu*a*atan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pibutingan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 370 buwan, 1,056 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 225 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 831 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 48%, Sakizaya 10%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pibutingan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pibutingan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pibutingan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pibutingan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pibutingan hya' ga Sudadatan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ piβutiŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na piβutiŋan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕu*a*atan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
